items.name: io.github.phibya/code-reviewer
items.title: Code Reviewer
items.summary: Expert code reviewer with a security-and-best-practices focus.

items.name: io.github.phibya/creative-writer
items.title: Creative Writer
items.summary: Professional creative writer for stories, articles, and content.

items.name: io.github.phibya/deep-researcher
items.title: Deep Researcher
items.summary: Multi-step research assistant. Pinned to a future ziee that ships the parallel sub-agent runtime.

items.name: io.github.phibya/sql-helper
items.title: SQL Helper
items.summary: Writes, explains, and optimizes SQL across Postgres, MySQL, and SQLite dialects.

items.name: io.github.phibya/vision-analyst
items.title: Vision Analyst
items.summary: Specialized assistant for image and visual content analysis.

items.name: app.linear/mcp
items.title: Linear MCP Server
items.summary: Manage Linear issues, projects, and cycles over Streamable HTTP.

items.name: com.brave/search-mcp
items.title: Brave Search MCP Server
items.summary: Web search via the Brave Search API for up-to-date information.

items.name: io.github.github/mcp
items.title: GitHub MCP Server
items.summary: Access GitHub repositories, issues, and pull requests over the official GitHub MCP endpoint.

items.name: io.github.modelcontextprotocol/filesystem
items.title: Filesystem MCP Server
items.summary: Local filesystem access (read/write/search) over MCP (stdio).

items.name: io.github.modelcontextprotocol/memory
items.title: Memory & Context MCP Server
items.summary: Store and retrieve conversation context, notes, and knowledge across sessions.

items.name: io.github.modelcontextprotocol/postgres
items.title: PostgreSQL MCP Server
items.summary: Connect to PostgreSQL databases, execute queries, manage schemas, and analyze data.

items.name: io.github.phibya/deepseek-r1-70b
items.title: DeepSeek-R1 70B
items.summary: Large reasoning model. Flagged as requiring a future ziee for its tensor-parallel runtime support.

items.name: io.github.phibya/llama-3-1-8b-instruct
items.title: Llama 3.1 8B
items.summary: Meta's Llama 3.1 8B instruction-tuned model with improved capabilities.

items.name: io.github.phibya/llama-3-2-3b-instruct-gguf
items.title: Llama 3.2 3B
items.summary: Meta's Llama 3.2 3B instruction-tuned model in GGUF format. Multiple quantizations available.

items.name: io.github.phibya/nomic-embed-text-v1-5-gguf
items.title: Nomic Embed Text v1.5
items.summary: High-quality general-purpose English embedding model (768-dim) packaged as GGUF for llama.cpp.

items.name: io.github.phibya/phi-3-mini-4k-instruct
items.title: Phi-3 Mini
items.summary: Microsoft's small but capable instruction-tuned model. Great for low-resource setups.

items.name: io.github.phibya/qwen2.5-coder-7b-instruct
items.title: Qwen2.5-Coder 7B
items.summary: Alibaba's Qwen2.5-Coder 7B — code generation, completion, and reasoning across 40+ languages.

items.name: io.github.phibya/qwen2.5-vl-3b-instruct
items.title: Qwen2.5-VL 3B
items.summary: Qwen2.5-VL 3B instruction-tuned vision-language model. Supports image understanding plus tool use.

items.name: io.github.ziee/answer-with-citations
items.title: Answer With Citations
items.summary: Confirm scope, fan-out search queries, synthesize a cited answer.

items.name: io.github.ziee/code-review
items.title: Code Review
items.summary: Walks git diff, reviews each file via LLM, synthesizes findings.

items.name: io.github.ziee/data-transform-pipeline
items.title: Data Transform Pipeline
items.summary: LLM detects shape, writes a Python transform script, sandbox runs + validates.

items.name: io.github.ziee/deep-research
items.title: Deep Research
items.summary: Multi-stage research pipeline -- query gen, fan-out search, cross-verify, outline, memo.

items.name: io.github.ziee/document-from-outline
items.title: Document From Outline
items.summary: Parse outline, fan-out write each section in parallel, assemble final doc.

items.name: io.github.ziee/extract-and-classify
items.title: Extract and Classify
items.summary: Chunk text, extract per chunk in parallel, classify aggregated extractions.

items.name: io.github.ziee/git-commit-summarize
items.title: Git Commit Summarize
items.summary: Capture git diff + status, draft a conventional-commits message.

items.name: io.github.ziee/research-summarize-write
items.title: Research, Summarize, Write
items.summary: Three-step llm chain: research a topic, summarize sources, write a memo.

items.name: io.github.ziee/web-page-to-markdown
items.title: Web Page to Markdown
items.summary: Fetch a URL, extract readable content, polish to clean markdown.

items.name: io.github.ziee/effective-prompting
items.title: Effective Prompting
items.summary: Model-agnostic techniques for clearer, more reliable LLM prompts — structure, output shaping, few-shot, and hallucination control.

items.name: io.github.ziee/sr-review
items.title: SR: Systematic Review (durable)
items.summary: End-to-end systematic review in one durable run: search + LLM auto-expansion + AI screen, a human screening gate, open-access full-text extraction, a human review gate, and a cited evidence synthesis.
